name: Lacrimosa
description: Chaos main DPS from ETD-4 who stacks Nightmare and detonates DoT—she swaps between Tomato Metal and Tomato Percussion for burst windows. Featured on the v1.1 Dreamwalk Corridor banner.

seo.title: Lacrimosa — Attack
seo.description: Lacrimosa is a Chaos attack Esper in NTE—Nightmare stacking, stance swaps, and a limited banner pick in the Dreamwalk Corridor update.
